mapper.select: /* com.shop.mapper.biz.Mis.selectProductViewList */ SELECT P.ID AS prodId , P.PROD_NM AS prodNm , P.REP_FILE_ID AS repFileId , COUNT(DISTINCT OI.ID) AS purchaseCnt , COUNT(DISTINCT C.ID) AS cartCnt , COUNT(DISTINCT PVL.ID) AS pageViewCnt , ROUND(( COUNT(DISTINCT OI.ID) * 100 + COUNT(DISTINCT C.ID) * 30 + COUNT(DISTINCT PVL.ID) * 5) / 100.0, 2) AS totalScore FROM TB_PRODUCT P LEFT JOIN TB_ORDER_ITEM OI ON OI.PRODUCT_ID = P.ID AND OI.CRE_TM >= #{fromDateTime} AND OI.CRE_TM < #{toDateTime} LEFT JOIN TB_PRODUCT_DET PD ON PD.PRODUCT_ID = P.ID AND PD.DEL_YN = 'N' LEFT JOIN TB_CART C ON C.PRODUCT_DET_ID = PD.ID AND C.CRE_TM >= #{fromDateTime} AND C.CRE_TM < #{toDateTime} LEFT JOIN TB_PAGE_VIEW_LOG PVL ON PVL.PRODUCT_ID = P.ID AND PVL.IS_BOUNCE = 'N' AND PVL.SCROLL_DEPTH >= 30 AND PVL.CRE_TM >= #{fromDateTime} AND PVL.CRE_TM < #{toDateTime} WHERE P.DEL_YN = 'N' GROUP BY P.ID, P.PROD_NM, P.REP_FILE_ID ORDER BY totalScore DESC
